summary: Platform Landing Page feature testing complete. All 11 test requirements passed - dark futuristic design, 13-node system chain, globe visualization, forces/contradictions/orientation engine diagrams, 5 investor sections, CTA navigation, and existing routes verified.

landing_page_verification.dark_design: PASS - Background rgb(5, 5, 16), dark futuristic theme applied
landing_page_verification.system_chain_13_nodes: PASS - All 13 nodes present: Cosmos, Space, Matter, Energy, Motion, Life, Human, Forces, Conflict, Orientation, Decision, Action, Impact
landing_page_verification.globe_visualization: PASS - 3 concentric rings with labels (Cosmos, Life, Human)
landing_page_verification.forces_flow: PASS - 4 directional forces displayed (Contribution, Recovery, Order, Exploration)
landing_page_verification.orientation_engine: PASS - Circular diagram with 6 nodes (Sense, Orient, Decide, Act, Reflect, Adapt)
landing_page_verification.investor_sections: PASS - All 5 sections present (problem, model, engine, application, vision)
landing_page_verification.cta_navigation: PASS - 'Enter the system' button navigates to /trust-test

existing_routes_verification.dashboard: PASS - /dashboard loads with all 6 tabs (Home, Feed, Community, Insights, Theory, History)

critical_code_review_comments: Landing page uses pure CSS animations (no external libraries) - correct implementation
IntersectionObserver threshold 0.12 may require more scroll to trigger some sections - acceptable behavior
All data-testid attributes present for key components enabling robust testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New platform landing page at '/' verified complete. All 13 system chain nodes, globe visualization, forces/contradictions/orientation engine components rendering correctly. CTA buttons navigate to /trust-test. Existing routes (/trust-test, /dashboard, /admin, /profile) unaffected.
